content.query:
StreamingEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventType_s in ('token_issued', 'stream_heartbeat')
| summarize Sessions = dcount(SessionId_s) by ClientRegion_s
| order by Sessions desc
content.title: Active Sessions by Region

content.query:
StreamingEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m), EventType_s
| render timechart
content.title: Event Timeline

content.query:
// Credential Sharing Detection
let timeWindow = 5m;
StreamingEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventType_s in ('token_issued', 'stream_heartbeat')
| summarize 
    Regions = make_set(ClientRegion_s),
    IPs = make_set(ClientIP_s),
    Sessions = dcount(SessionId_s)
  by UserId_s, bin(TimeGenerated, timeWindow)
| where array_length(Regions) >= 2
| extend RegionList = strcat_array(Regions, ', ')
| project TimeGenerated, UserId_s, RegionList, Sessions, IPs
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 20
content.size: Credential Sharing Detected (Same User, Multiple Regions)

content.query:
// Concurrent Stream Abuse
StreamingEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventType_s == 'stream_heartbeat'
| summarize 
    ActiveSessions = dcount(SessionId_s),
    MaxAllowed = max(toint(MaxStreams_d))
  by UserId_s, Tier_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 2m)
| where ActiveSessions > MaxAllowed
| extend Excess = ActiveSessions - MaxAllowed
| project TimeGenerated, UserId_s, Tier_s, ActiveSessions, MaxAllowed, Excess
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 20

StreamingEvents_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventType_s in ('token_issued', 'stream_heartbeat')
| summarize 
    Sessions = dcount(SessionId_s),
    Events = count(),
    Regions = make_set(ClientRegion_s),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
  by UserId_s, Tier_s
| extend RegionCount = array_length(Regions)
| project UserId_s, Tier_s, Sessions, Events, RegionCount, LastSeen
| order by Events desc
| take 25
content.title: Top Active Users
